snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32â€™ to tie at one and added two more in the 65â€™ and 85â€™. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70â€™ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27â€™ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

snippet.title: Demi Lovato: Dancing with the Devil | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Featuring the exclusive first listen to Demi Lovatoâ€™s title song to the powerful four-part documentary event, â€œDancing With the Devil.â€‌

Premiering March 23, Demi Lovato holds nothing back in this powerful four part documentary series exploring every aspect that led to her nearly fatal overdose in 2018, and her awakenings in the aftermath. Director Michael D. Ratner is granted unprecedented access to the superstarâ€™s personal and musical journey during the most trying time of her life as she unearths her prior traumas and discovers the importance of her physical, emotional, and mental health. Far deeper than an inside look beyond the celebrity surface, this is an intimate portrait of addiction, and the process of healing and empowerment.

pt-BR.description:

Demi Lovato nأ£o esconde nada nesse impactante documentأ،rio em quatro partes, que explora os aspectos que levaram أ  overdose que quase lhe tirou a vida em 2018, e o despertar que veio a seguir. id.title: Demi Lovato: Bermain-main dengan Bahaya | Trailer Resmi
id.description:
Pemutaran perdana lagu Demi Lovato untuk dokumenter epik, "Bermain-main dengan Bahaya".

Demi Lovato bicara blak-blakan dalam serial dokumenter epik empat bagian ini yang menggali semua aspek penyebab dia nyaris mengalami overdosis mematikan pada tahun 2018, dan kebangkitan dia setelahnya. Sutradara Michael D. Ratner mendapat akses khusus ke perjalanan pribadi dan musikal megabintang itu selama masa tersulit hidupnya saat dia mengungkap trauma masa lalu dan menyadari pentingnya kesehatan fisik, emosi, dan mental. Di balik kehidupan selebritas yang glamor, terdapat potret kecanduan yang parah, dan proses penyembuhan, serta pencerahan.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Supermanâ€™s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Disney's Cruella | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Brilliant. Bad. A little bit mad. May 2021.

Academy Awardآ® winner Emma Stone (â€œLa La Landâ€‌) stars in Disneyâ€™s â€œCruella,â€‌ an all-new live-action feature film about the rebellious early days of one of cinemas most notorious â€“ and notoriously fashionable â€“ villains, the legendary Cruella de Vil. â€œCruella,â€‌ which is set in 1970s London amidst the punk rock revolution, follows a young grifter named Estella, a clever and creative girl determined to make a name for herself with her designs. She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, Estellaâ€™s flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscarآ® winner Emma Thompson (â€œHowards End,â€‌ â€œSense & Sensibilityâ€‌). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
آ 
Disneyâ€™s â€œCruellaâ€‌ is directed by Craig Gillespie (â€œI Tonyaâ€‌) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (â€œFreaky Fridayâ€‌), Marc Platt (â€œMary Poppins Returnsâ€‌) and Kristin Burr (â€œChristopher Robinâ€‌), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscarآ®- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (â€œMad Max: Fury Road,â€‌ â€œA Room with a Viewâ€‌) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on â€œCruella,â€‌ follow us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DisneyCruellaDeVil
Twitter:آ https://twitter.com/cruella
Instagram:آ https://www.instagram.com/disneycruella
YouTube:https://youtube.com/disneymovietrailersâ€‹
Hashtag: #Cruella

snippet.title: 'Iâ€™m not a cat': lawyer gets stuck on Zoom kitten filter during court case
snippet.description:
A lawyer showed up to virtual court in the 394th district of Texas with a kitten filter turned on, the cat moving its lips and eyes, as Rod Ponton said he and his assistant were attempting to remove the filter during the court case.

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

snippet.title: Highlights | Resumo: FC Porto 2-2 Boavista (Liga 20/21 #19)
snippet.description:
#VSPORTS #LigaNOS #LigaPortugal
Empate a duas bolas entre FC Porto e Boavista, jogo emotivo atأ© ao final. A equipa axadrezada chegou a estar a vencer por 2-0, com golos de Porozo (8') e Elis em cima do intervalo, mas Mehdi (54') e Sأ©rgio Oliveira (82 g.p.) restabeleceram a igualdade. Os azuis-e-brancos teve a possibilidade de vencer, mas Sأ©rgio Oliveira desperdiأ§ou um segundo penأ،lti aos 86') e Evanilson viu o seu golo aos 89 ser anulado pelo VAR.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong â€“ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
آ 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, â€œGodzilla vs. Kong,â€‌ the next epic adventure in Legendaryâ€™s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in â€œGodzilla vs. Kongâ€‌ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansâ€”instigated by unseen forcesâ€”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgأ¥rd (â€œBig Little Lies,â€‌ â€œThe Little Drummer Girlâ€‌), Millie Bobby Brown (â€œStranger Thingsâ€‌), Rebecca Hall (â€œChristine,â€‌ â€œProfessor Marston and the Wonder Womenâ€‌), Brian Tyree Henry (â€œJoker,â€‌ â€œSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verseâ€‌), Shun Oguri (â€œWeathering with Youâ€‌), Eiza Gonzأ،lez (â€œFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shawâ€‌), Julian Dennison (â€œDeadpool 2â€‌), with Kyle Chandler (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monstersâ€‌) and Demiأ،n Bichir (â€œThe Nun,â€‌ â€œThe Hateful Eightâ€‌).
Wingard (â€œThe Guest,â€‌ â€œYouâ€™re Nextâ€‌) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (â€œThor: Ragnarokâ€‌) and Max Borenstein (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monsters,â€‌ â€œKong: Skull Islandâ€‌), story by Terry Rossio (â€œPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Talesâ€‌) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monstersâ€‌), based on the character â€œGodzillaâ€‌ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorâ€™s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (â€œThe Mummy,â€‌ â€œWorld War Zâ€‌), production designers Owen Paterson (â€œJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,â€‌ â€œGodzillaâ€‌) and Thomas S. Hammock (â€œBlair Witchâ€‌), editor Josh Schaeffer (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monstersâ€‌), costume designer Ann Foley (â€œSkyscraperâ€‌) and visual effects supervisor John â€œDJâ€‌ DesJardin (upcoming â€œZack Snyderâ€™s Justice Leagueâ€‌).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, â€œGodzilla vs. Kong.â€‌  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansâ€”instigated by unseen forcesâ€”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgأ¥rd (â€œBig Little Lies,â€‌ â€œThe Little Drummer Girlâ€‌), Millie Bobby Brown (â€œStranger Thingsâ€‌), Rebecca Hall (â€œChristine,â€‌ â€œProfessor Marston and the Wonder Womenâ€‌), Brian Tyree Henry (â€œJoker,â€‌ â€œSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verseâ€‌), Shun Oguri (â€œWeathering with Youâ€‌), Eiza Gonzأ،lez (â€œFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shawâ€‌), Julian Dennison (â€œDeadpool 2â€‌), with Kyle Chandler (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monstersâ€‌) and Demiأ،n Bichir (â€œThe Nun,â€‌ â€œThe Hateful Eightâ€‌).
Wingard (â€œThe Guest,â€‌ â€œYouâ€™re Nextâ€‌) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (â€œThor: Ragnarokâ€‌) and Max Borenstein (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monsters,â€‌ â€œKong: Skull Islandâ€‌), story by Terry Rossio (â€œPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Talesâ€‌) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monstersâ€‌), based on the character â€œGodzillaâ€‌ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorâ€™s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (â€œThe Mummy,â€‌ â€œWorld War Zâ€‌), production designers Owen Paterson (â€œJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,â€‌ â€œGodzillaâ€‌) and Thomas S. Hammock (â€œBlair Witchâ€‌), editor Josh Schaeffer (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monstersâ€‌), costume designer Ann Foley (â€œSkyscraperâ€‌) and visual effects supervisor John â€œDJâ€‌ DesJardin (upcoming â€œZack Snyderâ€™s Justice Leagueâ€‌).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, â€œGodzilla vs. Kong.â€‌  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.
